company.name: NovaCamp
company.description: An intensive product-focused learning platform for engineers and aspiring PMs who want to build, ship, and lead real products. Not a lecture series. A structured builder environment.

product_engineering.name: NovaCamp Product Engineering
product_engineering.tagline: 12-month program for engineers who want to build products end-to-end
product_engineering.target: Software engineers with 0-7 YoE who want to move from task execution to product ownership
core_modules: Shipping & Iteration: from MVP to Scale
key_differentiators: Every module ends with a shipped artifact, not an exam
Live sessions with instructors who've built products at scale
1:1 mentorship from engineers and PMs at top product companies
Cohort-based with peer reviews and team shipping sprints
AI integrated into every module as a building tool, not a topic
Curriculum updates continuously at no extra cost

product_management.name: NovaCamp Product Management
product_management.tagline: For builders who want to lead what gets built
product_management.target: Engineers, analysts, and operators transitioning into PM roles at product companies
key_differentiators: Every module built around real case studies from Indian product companies
Instructors are PMs and CPOs from top startups and FAANG
Portfolio of 6+ shipped case studies by graduation
Mock PM interviews with hiring managers
No slides-only learning. You build prototypes, run experiments, write specs.

ai_builder.name: NovaCamp AI Builder
ai_builder.tagline: Ship production AI systems, not just notebooks
ai_builder.target: Engineers who want applied AI depth: RAG, agents, evals, production LLMs
ai_builder.key_differentiator: 100% project-based. No theory modules. Every week you ship something that works.

placement_outcomes.source: Independent placement assessment by third-party audit firm
placement_outcomes.placement_rate: 88% of eligible graduates placed within 6 months
placement_outcomes.typical_service_to_product_jump: From 6-14 LPA service roles to 20-30+ LPA product company roles within 6-12 months

financing.no_cost_emi: Available up to 12 months through NBFC partners
financing.scholarship: Up to 30,000 INR based on entrance assessment performance
financing.refund_policy: 14-day full refund window from first session
financing.pause_option: Up to 3 months course pause available

instructors.background: Engineers and PMs from Google, Flipkart, Razorpay, PhonePe, Microsoft, Atlassian, and high-growth Indian startups
instructors.key_point: Every instructor has shipped products used by millions. Teaching is a choice, not a fallback.
instructors.format: Live sessions with real-time doubt resolution. No pre-recorded lectures as primary content.

entrance_assessment.difficulty: Calibrated to assess current level, not to filter out. Beginners are expected to clear it.
entrance_assessment.scholarship_link: Performance determines scholarship amount (up to 30K off program fee)

differentiators: Live sessions with real-time feedback vs pre-recorded content with 4% completion rates
1:1 mentorship from industry practitioners vs self-study
Placement infrastructure (referrals, mock interviews, hiring drives) vs no career services
Cohort accountability and peer reviews vs isolated learning
Portfolio of shipped projects graded by mentors vs certificates
Curriculum updated continuously vs static course content

service_to_product.pattern: Engineers from TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant moving to Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Razorpay

career_switcher.pattern: Non-CS backgrounds (commerce, mechanical, electrical) transitioning into product engineering and PM roles
career_switcher.key_factor: Structured project portfolio + mock interview prep + referral network

important_caveats.no_job_guarantee: NovaCamp provides placement assistance, not a guaranteed job. Outcomes depend on effort, market conditions, and role availability.
important_caveats.time_commitment: 10-12 hours per week minimum. This is intensive.
important_caveats.eligibility_for_support: Placement support requires completing mandatory modules and projects.
important_caveats.not_for_everyone: If you cannot commit consistent time, wait until you can. We would rather you join when ready than struggle through.
